mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (userId, businessId, orderDate, orderTotal, daId, orderState) VALUES (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), #{orderTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{daId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0)

INSERT INTO orders (userId, businessId, orderDate, orderTotal, daId, orderState) VALUES (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderTotal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{daId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderState,jdbcType=INTEGER})
INSERT INTO orderdetailet (orderId, foodId, quantity) VALUES (#{orderId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{foodId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select: SELECT orderId, userId, businessId, orderDate, orderTotal, daId, orderState FROM orders WHERE userId = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY orderDate DESC
